name: Streamkap
description: Streamkap — Managed CDC platform using Debezium to stream database changes to Kafka, Snowflake, and data lakes.

seo.title: Streamkap — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Streamkap: Streamkap — Managed CDC platform using Debezium to stream database changes to Kafka, Snowflake, and data lakes.

when_to_use: Managed Debezium CDC streaming database changes to Kafka
Postgres and MySQL CDC to Snowflake with sub-minute latency
Real-time data lake synchronization from operational databases
Replacing self-hosted Debezium with a managed CDC service
Event streaming from relational databases to data warehouses

pros: Managed Debezium removes CDC operational burden
Sub-second latency to Snowflake, BigQuery, Iceberg
Schema evolution handled without pipeline breaks
cons: Still heavily tied to Debezium's source coverage
Kafka knowledge helpful to debug edge cases
Smaller company vs Confluent or Fivetran
review.verdict: Solid managed CDC at a fraction of DIY Kafka+Debezium cost, if Debezium's source list covers your stack.
review.best_for: Data teams needing real-time Postgres/MySQL/Mongo to warehouse pipelines
review.not_for: Batch-only ELT use cases or sources outside Debezium's connector range
